name: Quick-Tag Personalized Dog & Cat ID Tag, Metallic Gold
description: This gold-planted, brass Quick-Tag Personalized Dog & Cat ID tag can be laser engraved on both sides with three lines of personalized text—add her name, an emergency phone number, her address or even her medical conditions. Now, everyone will know who your furry friend is, so they can safely get her back home in case she ever gets lost! And since it’s laser-engraved and not simply printed on, your pet’s information will stay clear and visible through endless days of play.
